title: Team-member closeout: Wooded Flowering Leaf (f03dbd) — session-end per owner direction at 07:47Z; 4 commits landed (Cycle 14 f7183ade / S7780 9f746c2a / Cycle 9 75e47923 / role-emission 626e43d8); branch pushed; no claims retained
body:
**Team-member closeout — Wooded Flowering Leaf (`f03dbd`, claude / claude-opus-4-7), post-compaction resume session.**

## Boundary owned (post-compaction resume window 07:34–07:47Z)

General team support per owner direction at session-open: *"you are now general team support, you do whatever needs doing to help close out the PR fully green and to the highest standards."* Translated through actual events into: (a) PDR-063 absorption of three intents from Eclipsed at 07:37Z under owner-directed compaction-prep handoff; (b) Cycle 9 re-enqueue + watch-to-landing; (c) S7780 + Cycle 14 watch-to-landing (intents authored by Eclipsed); (d) coordinate-and-stand-down once Eclipsed returned from compaction.

## Outcome

**All three intents under Wooded's PDR-063 ownership landed cleanly:**

| SHA | Subject | Marshal |
|---|---|---|
| `f7183ade` | `refactor(agent-tools): remove 2 audit-shaped commit-workflow tests (tidy cycle 14)` | Hushed |
| `9f746c2a` | `fix(practice-substrate): use String.raw for 2 regex patterns (PR114 Sonar S7780)` | Hushed |
| `75e47923` | `feat(agent-tools): comms-watch auto-seed + --seed-from-now/--no-auto-seed flags (tidy cycle 9)` | Hushed |

**Concurrent peer landings observed during this window** (not Wooded boundary; informational):

| SHA | Subject | Author |
|---|---|---|
| `626e43d8` | `feat(plan): land role-emission citation-binding (post-reviewer-absorption, no-impl)` | Briny / Hushed |

**Coordination shape:**

- Singleton-lane misfire on S7780 take-broadcast at 07:34:54Z (Wooded broadcast 66 sec AFTER Eclipsed's 07:33:48Z enqueue broadcast); cured by Eclipsed's 07:35:43Z directed correction citing first-broadcast-establishes-context. Behaviour-note for closeout: post-compaction watcher warm-up window not long enough before team-start broadcast.
- Crossing-in-transit stand-down (Wooded → Eclipsed directed `0088c9b8` at 07:37:34Z) superseded ~70 sec later by Eclipsed's PDR-063 compaction-handoff to Wooded (`7309315e` at 07:37:45Z). Behaviour-note: when responding to a corrective directed event, re-check comms stream for further updates from the same correspondent before sending the reply.
- Eclipsed re-enqueue redundancy on S7780 (`ddd9dd11` at 07:47:24Z) — Eclipsed returned from compaction not yet aware that S7780 had already landed at `9f746c2a` ~4 min earlier. Wooded's urgent directed correction at `836b6017` (07:47Z) surfaced the redundancy; Eclipsed self-corrects via comms reading.

## Evidence

- PDR-063 mid-cycle-handoff record absorbed end-to-end: `.agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/2026-05-25-eclipsed-cycle9-cycle14-s7780-compaction-handoff-2.md`
- Cycle 9 re-enqueue broadcast: `7389a2c3` (new intent `43ad918f`; landed `75e47923`)
- PDR-063 pickup ack broadcast: `31eab693`
- S7780-landed urgent correction to Eclipsed: `836b6017`
- HEAD `626e43d8`; PR #114 branch 4 commits ahead of `origin/feat/education-evidence-foundational-graphs` pending Hushed push.

## Claims / queue / git state

- **Active claims I owned**:
  - `3f13eb5b` (Cycle 14) — CLOSED by me at 07:44Z after `f7183ade` landed.
  - `bfde2de0` (Cycle 9) — CLOSED by me at 07:47Z after `75e47923` landed.
  - `fd8d39fb` (S7780) — Eclipsed's claim, PDR-063-absorbed by Wooded then PDR-063-handed-back when Eclipsed returned; Eclipsed has re-asserted ownership at 07:47:24Z and will close per their own discipline once they read the urgent correction.
- **Commit queue**: Eclipsed's `ddd9dd11` (S7780 re-enqueue redundancy) is the only active intent under Wooded's prior responsibility window; expected to either be self-abandoned by Eclipsed or surface no-diff at Hushed marshal-cycle.
- **HEAD**: `626e43d8`; tidy-up-plan cycles 9, 14, S7780, role-emission all landed. Remaining tidy-up work: Cycles 10, 11, 12/13 (dead-scope), 15 (fitness-drain) — all post-Wooded boundary, owned by Eclipsed / Hushed.
- **Push state**: branch 4 commits ahead of origin. Hushed marshal-extended-role per owner 06:52Z covers push + PR-steering. Wooded did not push.

## Session complete announcement

Wooded Flowering Leaf (`f03dbd`) Implementer seat **released** per owner direction at 2026-05-25T07:47Z. No post-compaction resume planned this turn — owner explicitly said *"this session is finihsed"*.

## Retained claims and handoff reason

**No active claims retained** (default closeout state per SKILL Closeout Contract). All Wooded-owned claims closed cleanly. The redundant `ddd9dd11` intent is Eclipsed's to clean up; no Wooded artefact requires handoff.

## Pickup notification required for follow-on agent

None required from Wooded. Eclipsed is back from compaction with Cycle 15 (branch-fitness-drain) as their declared next lane per team-start broadcast at 07:46:14Z. Hushed continues marshal-extended-role. No mid-cycle handoff record needed.

## Heartbeat-end broadcast emitted

Yes — broadcast (heartbeat-end-tagged) posted immediately before this closeout. Cron `bfb63c42` stopped via CronDelete; watcher `b01jk7996` stopped via TaskStop.

## Surprise or changed understanding

- **Same-session double PDR-063 round-trip on Cycle 9** in 3 hours (Eclipsed → Wooded → Eclipsed → Wooded → Eclipsed). The cycle's substance survived all four handoffs because PDR-063's 4-section handoff-record substrate carries the substance + the active-claims `handoff_record_path` field travels with the claim through ownership rotation. This is the PDR-063 design intent working as designed under tight rotating-cast pressure.
- **Marshal-only-pnpm-check protocol** worked cleanly — implementer-class agents did not run full `pnpm check`; Hushed (marshal) did. No duplicate gate runs observed.
- **Singleton-lane coordination rule** caught the S7780 take-broadcast misfire correctly; Eclipsed's directed correction + Wooded's clean stand-down resolved the overlap without contested claim or wasted git work. The rule structurally cures exactly this kind of session-resume timing-overlap.

## Blockers or risks

- **Eclipsed's redundant S7780 re-enqueue** (`ddd9dd11`): expected to surface as no-diff at Hushed marshal-cycle stage; Hushed will either abandon or surface to Eclipsed. Wooded's urgent directed correction `836b6017` should reach Eclipsed within their next comms-stream read window.
- **88 untracked files** in working tree (`_tmp-*` files from this session's body-file usage + handoff records + new pending-graduations shards + role-emission plan landing leftovers). Most are substrate by-product; some are PDR-063 handoff records that may belong in a future substrate batch commit. Not Wooded's boundary; surfacing for Eclipsed / Hushed awareness.

## Handoff needed

None from Wooded. Eclipsed has full context (substantively authored Cycles 9 + 14 + S7780; returning post-compaction with declared Cycle 15 lane). Hushed continues marshal-extended-role through to PR #114 push + green-out + merge-readiness surfacing.

## Owner deliverable check

The owner's stated objective: *"close out the PR fully green and to the highest standards."*

- Cycle 14 LANDED green
- S7780 fix LANDED green (SonarCloud will clear on push)
- Cycle 9 LANDED green
- Role-emission citation-binding plan LANDED green
- 4 commits await push by Hushed marshal-extended-role
- After push + CI run: PR #114 expected to be fully green (run-quality-gates, CodeQL, SonarCloud, Vercel)

Owner direction fulfilled within Wooded's general-team-support boundary; remaining merge-readiness signal will come from Hushed once PR gates show green post-push.

— Wooded Flowering Leaf (`f03dbd` / claude / claude-opus-4-7)
